title: SandboxSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents Sandbox settings. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

disableSandboxExpirationEmails.description: Indicates whether to disable sandbox expiration email notifications for the source (production) org: true or false. When disabled in the source (production) org, users no longer receive email notifications for impending deletions of sandboxes that have been inactive for 180 days or longer.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="SandboxSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="disableSandboxExpirationEmails" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="sandboxDetailNewUIOptOut" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
